name: Sweetened Sesame Pita
recipeIngredient: 1 each Recipe basic pita prepared (as far as the kneading)
recipeInstructions:
1. Shape kneaded dough into an even rectangle and cut in half lengthwise.
2. Divide into 12 equal portions.
3. Shape each portion into a smooth ball and place on a floured surface.
4. Cover with damp towels and let rest in a warm place for 30 to 45 minutes.
5. Fifteen minutes before they finish rising, preheat oven to 425°F and lightly grease a baking sheet.
6. Blend sugar with cold water until you have a thick paste. Add more water if necessary.
7. Set aside.
8. Working on 2 balls at a time, press each ball flat.
9. Roll out each round to a 7-inch circle.
10. Place two rounds on the baking sheet.
11. Spread the sugar paste evenly over the top of each round.
12. Sprinkle with 4 teaspoons sesame seeds.
13. Press down to ensure that the seeds stick.
14. Score each pita into 8 wedges.
15. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes.
16. Remove from oven, separate the wedges and cool on wire racks.
Note: These pitas do not puff.
